items.title: SO UNDERRATED!??
items.summary: i played arcknights or whatever other game had a similar card playing style to this one.... and let me tell you, i did not hit like this one did! i love this game so much! story is good, characters are pretty, game style is satisfying!! fave game so far 💗 i wish there was a bigger community around it!
items.author: loveharmxny
